initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 1 AND 20 THEN 1 END) > 0 
       THEN AVG(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 1 AND 20 THEN ss_ext_discount_amt END) 
       ELSE AVG(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 1 AND 20 THEN ss_net_paid END) END AS bucket1,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 21 AND 40 THEN 1 END) > 0 
       THEN AVG(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 21 AND 40 THEN ss_ext_discount_amt END) 
       ELSE AVG(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 21 AND 40 THEN ss_net_paid END) END AS bucket2,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 41 AND 60 THEN 1 END) > 0 
       THEN AVG(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 41 AND 60 THEN ss_ext_discount_amt END) 
       ELSE AVG(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 41 AND 60 THEN ss_net_paid END) END AS bucket3,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 61 AND 80 THEN 1 END) > 0 
       THEN AVG(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 61 AND 80 THEN ss_ext_discount_amt END) 
       ELSE AVG(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 61 AND 80 THEN ss_net_paid END) END AS bucket4,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 81 AND 100 THEN 1 END) > 0 
       THEN AVG(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 81 AND 100 THEN ss_ext_discount_amt END) 
       ELSE AVG(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 81 AND 100 THEN ss_net_paid END) END AS bucket5
FROM store_sales, reason
WHERE store_sales.ss_reason_sk = reason.r_reason_sk
  AND reason.r_reason_sk = 1;

SELECT
  CASE 
    WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 1 AND 20 THEN 1 END) > 5 THEN 
      AVG(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 1 AND 20 THEN ss_ext_discount_amt END)
    ELSE 
      AVG(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 1 AND 20 THEN ss_net_paid END)
  END AS bucket1,
  CASE 
    WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 21 AND 40 THEN 1 END) > 5 THEN 
      AVG(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 21 AND 40 THEN ss_ext_discount_amt END)
    ELSE 
      AVG(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 21 AND 40 THEN ss_net_paid END)
  END AS bucket2,
  CASE 
    WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 41 AND 60 THEN 1 END) > 5 THEN 
      AVG(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 41 AND 60 THEN ss_ext_discount_amt END)
    ELSE 
      AVG(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 41 AND 60 THEN ss_net_paid END)
  END AS bucket3,
  CASE 
    WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 61 AND 80 THEN 1 END) > 5 THEN 
      AVG(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 61 AND 80 THEN ss_ext_discount_amt END)
    ELSE 
      AVG(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 61 AND 80 THEN ss_net_paid END)

    ELSE 
      AVG(CASE WHEN ss_quantity BETWEEN 81 AND 100 THEN ss_net_paid END)

  CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ss_quantity BETWEEN 1 AND 20) > 0 THEN AVG(ss_ext_discount_amt) FILTER (WHERE ss_quantity BETWEEN 1 AND 20) ELSE AVG(ss_net_paid) FILTER (WHERE ss_quantity BETWEEN 1 AND 20) END AS bucket1,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ss_quantity BETWEEN 21 AND 40) > 0 THEN AVG(ss_ext_discount_amt) FILTER (WHERE ss_quantity BETWEEN 21 AND 40) ELSE AVG(ss_net_paid) FILTER (WHERE ss_quantity BETWEEN 21 AND 40) END AS bucket2,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ss_quantity BETWEEN 41 AND 60) > 0 THEN AVG(ss_ext_discount_amt) FILTER (WHERE ss_quantity BETWEEN 41 AND 60) ELSE AVG(ss_net_paid) FILTER (WHERE ss_quantity BETWEEN 41 AND 60) END AS bucket3,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ss_quantity BETWEEN 61 AND 80) > 0 THEN AVG(ss_ext_discount_amt) FILTER (WHERE ss_quantity BETWEEN 61 AND 80) ELSE AVG(ss_net_paid) FILTER (WHERE ss_quantity BETWEEN 61 AND 80) END AS bucket4,
  CASE WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ss_quantity BETWEEN 81 AND 100) > 0 THEN AVG(ss_ext_discount_amt) FILTER (WHERE ss_quantity BETWEEN 81 AND 100) ELSE AVG(ss_net_paid) FILTER (WHERE ss_quantity BETWEEN 81 AND 100) END AS bucket5
FROM store_sales
JOIN reason ON store_sales.ss_reason_sk = reason.r_reason_sk
WHERE reason.r_reason_sk = 1;
